race.comment: CANYA BERICH (8) went down by a narrow margin in town last time out and will find this assignment much more to her liking. Rodd sticks in the irons following that last-start placing and will strip fitter third-up from the spell. Sure to prove very hard to toss. KALAMIA KING (2) has hit the top five in nine of his past ten starts and is usually thereabouts. Has to be included from the favourable draw. SPEEGLE (10) will be rock-hard fit for this and may earn some minor money. DIVIL A BIT (1) has placed over this distance range and gets Allen on board. Rounds out the selections in a race with a long tail.
